definition: An animal with wings that can fly.
example: The bird sang in the tree.

definition: People who play or work together.
White drink that helps bones grow strong.
The bright star that warms our daytime.
example: The sun came out after the rain.

definition: To touch lightly; what you do on a screen.
example: Tap the green button to start.

definition: A big furry animal that may sleep through winter.
example: We read a story about a shy bear.

definition: A small baked sweet treat, sometimes with chips.
example: She earned a cookie after cleanup.

definition: A contest to see who is fastest.
example: Our school held a friendly race on field day.

definition: A machine that can move or talk like it thinks.
example: The toy robot rolled across the rug.

definition: A curved band of colors after sunlight meets rain.
example: We counted the colors in the rainbow.

definition: A wooden or plastic piece you stack to build.
example: He lined up blocks to make a tower.

definition: A hard cover some ocean animals carry on their backs.
example: She found a spiral shell at the beach.

definition: Hard headgear that keeps you safer when you ride or play.
example: Always snap your helmet before you scooter.
